name: neolinkapi-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the Java and Node.js NeoLinkAPI implementations.

scripts.build:all: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs build && node scripts/run-gradle-android.cjs build && npm run build --workspace packages/nodejs
scripts.test:all: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs test && node scripts/run-gradle-android.cjs testDebugUnitTest && npm run test --workspace packages/nodejs
scripts.build:all:offline: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs build --offline && node scripts/run-gradle-android.cjs build --offline && npm run build --workspace packages/nodejs
scripts.test:all:offline: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs test --offline && node scripts/run-gradle-android.cjs testDebugUnitTest --offline && npm run test --workspace packages/nodejs
scripts.ci:node: npm run check:version && npm run check:shared && npm run test:nodejs
scripts.ci:all: npm run ci:node && npm run ci:java && npm run ci:android
